title: Satya Nag Champa Karma Incense Sticks | x12 pack | with SAMASIA incense sticks holder | Used for Kaomatherapy, Spa, Yoga, Weddings, Meditation, Healing, Positivity and Relaxation
features: Satya Nag Champa 12 pack of Incense Sticks is a fantastic way to enjoy this famous fragrance for long time.
The sticks made of natural materials such as wood flour, resin and herbs are immersed in pure essential oil to ensure that the fragrance intensity of each incense stick is as strong as possible.
Incense sticks can be used for Aromatherapy, Spa, Yoga, Weddings, Reiki, Meditation, Healing, Sensual Therapy, Positivity, Relaxation and much more.

Manufactured in India. Satya provides traditionally luxury handcrafted incense in beautiful fragrant scents. Prepared using only the highest quality and purest of ingredients provided by nature, that are free from chemicals and are ethically sourced.
The pack contains 12 packs of Nag Champa incense sticks and also comes with SAMASIA incense sticks holder
description: Product Description What is an Incense stick? Incense is aromatic biotic material that releases fragrant smoke when burned. Direct-burning incense is either a paste formed around a bamboo stick , or a paste that is extruded into a stick or cone shape. Usages of Incense Sticks What is Aromatherapy
